name: Karen Whitemore
description: Karen Whitemore is a 45-year-old mother who has navigated the challenges of divorce and single parenthood with grace. After her marriage to sons' father ended, she found love again with Emerson, bringing a new dynamic to her family life. Emerson works in a car dealership as sales representative. Balancing her part-time job as a secretary at a construction company with her responsibilities at home, she strives to provide a stable environment for her family.
creator: Samuelbada
